description: Argumentative reasoning contract for evidence-weighted evaluation, policy-aware deliberation, and auditable decision selection.

evaluate.description: Evaluate enriched evidence and return a decision artifact.

deliberate.description: Compare candidate actions or explanations and rank them by support and policy fit.

justify.description: Produce an auditable justification for a selected decision.

learn.description: Accept post-decision observations for future policy or argument refinement.

metadata.notes: Representative contract for argumentative reasoning providers in the [&] Protocol.
